---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem — e.g. "I always have to...", "There's no way to..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What would the feature look like? If it's an API change, show example code.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Output format**
Which output format(s) does this affect? [docx / pdf / html / all]

**Additional context**
Anything else — screenshots, references to similar features in other tools, etc.
